<!-- Thanks for contributing! Briefly describe what the PR changes and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added (if the change ships to users)
- [ ] Version not hand-edited — `manifest.json`/`package.json` versions are only ever changed via `npm version patch|minor|major --no-git-tag-version`
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` or similar attribution trailers in commits
